title: Ability to add text block to the service portal homepage
excerpt: I would like the ability to add a text block to the homepage of a Service Portal, to advise users on how best to use the forms linked within.

posts.author: HayleyTaylor (Hayley Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like the ability to add a text block to the homepage of a Service Portal, to advise users on how best to use the forms linked within.
